overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the futuristic Night City. The clip begins in clear golden hour lighting with busy streets and elevated highways, transitions past an NCPD police scene, and ends in a heavily hazy, dust-filled intersection with reduced visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown street with multi-level highways

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk through a busy futuristic city street with elevated highways overhead

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the multi-lane street
pedestrian in blue outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying a face with blue neon accents
multi-level highway overpass with orange structural beams
tall building with distinctive grid-patterned facade in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a bustling futuristic sidewalk during golden hour, with massive digital billboards and elevated highways dominating the skyline. The atmosphere is clear and warm, with moderate pedestrian traffic and vehicles moving along the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with NCPD police checkpoint

events.description: encounter NCPD police car and officers parked on the sidewalk against the industrial wall
moving into shadow alongside the tall industrial building wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the police scene, moving alongside a tall industrial wall with warning signs

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer standing next to the patrol car with arms crossed

entered.detail: white and blue police vehicle with NCPD markings and glowing blue accents
tall concrete wall with red triangular warning signs and illuminated yellow windows
security fencing topped with barbed wire along the industrial building

segments.scene_description: The character passes an NCPD police checkpoint with officers and a patrol car parked alongside an imposing industrial building. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character walks in the shadow of the tall wall, with sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: dusty intersection with overhead signage and gas station

events.description: heavy dust or pollution haze significantly reduces visibility and changes atmosphere to sepia tone
crossing the multi-lane street at the intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating through the hazy intersection, crossing the street with other pedestrians while avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the hazy intersection with headlights on
pedestrian in red jacket crossing the street alongside ego

entered.detail: large overhead metal structure with multiple directional signs and arrows
fuel station with red and white branding visible through the haze
curved highway overpass sweeping across the sky
triangular-shaped billboard structure with digital displays

segments.scene_description: The character enters a heavily polluted or dusty zone where visibility drops significantly and the lighting shifts to a sepia haze. The character crosses a multi-lane intersection beneath large overhead sign gantries, navigating through sparse traffic and other pedestrians in the obscured atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant futuristic cityscape that gradually descends into a polluted, low-visibility haze. It begins on a bustling sidewalk during the golden hour, moving beneath massive digital billboards and elevated highways under a clear, warm sky. As the character progresses, the environment becomes more enclosed and shadowed while passing an NCPD police checkpoint and a towering industrial wall. The scene then shifts into a heavily polluted zone where the golden light fades into a thick sepia haze, significantly reducing visibility. Finally, the camera navigates through a multi-lane intersection beneath large overhead gantries, moving through sparse traffic and obscured pedestrians in the dusty atmosphere.
